topStories.description: YouTube has raised Premium subscription prices in the US, increasing costs for individual and family plans. The move comes amid wider streaming price hikes, though the platform has denied reports of longer unskippable ads.

topStories.title: US federal court hears new case against Trump tariffs
topStories.description: The case is to overturn the temporary tariffs that Trump imposed after the Supreme Court struck down his earlier ones.

topStories.title: US Army Describe 'Movie-Like' Kuwait Attack, Call Pentagon Claim "Falsehood"
topStories.description: In their first public remarks, soldiers from the army's 103rd Sustainment Command said that the attack was a direct hit on a lightly protected facility, contradicting US Defence Secretary Pete...

topStories.title: In Bengal, Amit Shah's 'Na Janata, Na Mamata' Jab At Congress
topStories.description: Reacting to the oft-repeated Trinamool charge that the Election Commission favours the BJP, Mr Shah said the allegation is a ploy by Ms Banerjee to garner what he called sympathy votes.

topStories.title: Trump Singles Out Palantir's War Fighting Capabilities' In Post
topStories.description: Trump's social media post echoed comments made by guest Michael Lee, who was championing the role Palantir's technology played in the raid to capture Venezuelan strongman Nicolas Maduro.

topStories.title: Supreme Court terms U.P. child assault, its aftermath ‘appalling’; calls for independent probe
topStories.description: Court calls for immediate SC-monitored and time-bound investigation of the case by a Central independent investigating agency or a Special Investigation Team

topStories.title: Starmer and Trump talked military options to reopen Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: British PM Starmer said he and US President Donald Trump discussed “military capabilities” to reopen Hormuz.

topStories.title: Software That Rained Death On Iran: How Palantir's Maven Helped US Military
topStories.description: The Iran war is probably the world's first large-scale example of artificial intelligence directing military operations in real time.

topStories.title: From a DMK campaigner and fan of MGR to renowned littérateur
topStories.description: Kalapriya says that before joining the DMK, MGR was associated with the Congress. Over the time, he surrounded himself with seasoned political minds, including communist leaders K.  Baladhandayutham  and  Kalyanasundaram. He was further supported by experienced figures such as K.A. Krishnaswamy  and Panruti S. Ramachandran. This combination of cinematic influence and political acumen gave him an exceptional grasp of governance as well as mass psychology.

topStories.title: TN voter deleted from electoral roll reminds Supreme Court of promise to protect in case of ‘mass exclusion’
topStories.description: The petitioner, C. Geetha, said her name had been a mainstay in the State’s electoral roll over the years; she was even intending to contest as an independent candidate in the 51-Uthangarai (SC) Assembly Constituency and 52-Bargur Assembly Constituency in the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections in 2026.

topStories.title: JD Vance expects ‘positive’ US-Iran war talks as he departs for Pakistan
topStories.description: Vice president says Trump gave 'pretty clear guidelines' on talks, which will be productive if Iran does not 'play' US.

topStories.title: US-Iran peace talks in Islamabad face massive hurdles
topStories.description: Ali Vaez, says upcoming talks between the US and Iran may be marred by a deficit of trust.

dailyNews.title: In Peru’s presidential race, a pro-Trump frontrunner sinks in final stretch
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump has sought greater influence over Latin America, but in Peru's election, will a pro-Trump stance pay off?

dailyNews.title: Potholes and progress: Mamdani reflects on 100 days as New York’s mayor
dailyNews.description: Mamdani's first 100 days marked by childcare reforms, pothole fixes and polarising debates over affordability policies.

dailyNews.title: Inflation rises in US amid Iran war, Hormuz blockade
dailyNews.description: Government report shows gasoline going up by 21.2 percent in March as petrol remains above $4 per gallon despite truce.

dailyNews.title: Zohran Mamdani marks 100 days in New York City Mayor's office
dailyNews.description: Zohran Mamdani, a Democrat, has notched a few notable early wins, and has reached a detente - at least for now - with US President Donald Trump.

dailyNews.title: France to ditch Windows for Linux to reduce reliance on US tech
dailyNews.description: France's move to ditch Windows for Linux is its latest effort to reduce its reliance on American tech giants.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan sets modest goal for US-Iran summit: A deal to keep talks going
dailyNews.description: US-Iran talks open in Islamabad with mediators focused on keeping dialogue alive amid deep divisions.

dailyNews.title: Was Trump ready to fire Tulsi Gabbard over Iran war testimony? Report claims Roger Stone intervened
dailyNews.description: Trump spoke with his cabinet members and asked he should replace Tulsi Gabbard. Trump was reportedly frustrated over Gabbard shielding one of her former employees who resigned over America's Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Vance expects ‘positive’ Iran talks as he heads to Islamabad
dailyNews.description: US VP JD Vance says Trump gave “clear guidelines” for Iran talks in Pakistan and expects “positive” negotiations.

dailyNews.title: Pacers fans go viral after animated conversation caught on camera during Nets game in Brooklyn
dailyNews.description: A couple's animated conversation at the Indiana Pacers vs. Brooklyn Nets game went viral, with the woman claiming it's just how they talk to each other.

dailyNews.title: Michelle Obama says America going through its 'janky' era
dailyNews.description: Michelle Obama told comedian Hasan Minhaj on her podcast that America is in a "janky" era, and said it was necessary to the country's growth.

dailyNews.title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman's home targeted in Molotov cocktail attack, man arrested, police say
dailyNews.description: A person is in custody in San Francisco, California, on Friday for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at the home of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman.

dailyNews.title: Realtor's cold case murder suspect accused of fleeing scene, skipping 911 call in new witness account: report
dailyNews.description: Newly released court documents reveal a witness reportedly saw suspect Kristin Ramsey flee erratically after the 2011 shooting of Ashley Okland in Iowa.

topStories.title: FLASHBACK: Dems want to boot Trump with 25th amendment, but refused to do so under Biden
topStories.description: More than 50 Democratic lawmakers are calling for President Donald Trump's removal via the 25th Amendment, despite dismissing similar GOP calls targeting former President Joe Biden.

topStories.title: Anti-Israel agitator Mahmoud Khalil one step closer to deportation with immigration board ruling
topStories.description: The Board of Immigration Appeals issued a final removal order for Mahmoud Khalil, advancing the Trump administration's push to deport the Columbia graduate student.

topStories.title: Melania Trump advisor says she's had 'enough' after breaking silence to deny Jeffrey Epstein connection
topStories.description: Advisor Marc Beckman says Melania Trump denied ties to Jeffrey Epstein because "enough is enough," calling on the public to focus on her achievements.

topStories.title: Cuban president clashes with NBC’s Welker over question about stepping down, presses if she asks same of Trump
topStories.description: Cuban leader Miguel Díaz-Canel pushed back when NBC's Kristen Welker asked if he would step down, calling Cuba a free sovereign state not subject to U.S. demands.

dailyNews.title: Trump Attacks Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly Over Iran War Criticism
dailyNews.description: In a lengthy social media post, the president attacked Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly and others in starkly personal terms. He also criticized the editorial board of The Wall Street Journal.

dailyNews.title: Melania Trump Says She Was Not Associated With Jeffrey Epstein
dailyNews.description: Responding to what she said were smears, the first lady said she never had knowledge of Jeffrey Epstein’s abuse and was not a victim of his. She called for a congressional hearing for his victims.

dailyNews.title: Trump Posts Graphic Video of Deadly Attack and Rails Against Haitian Immigrants
dailyNews.description: The man seen beating a woman is from Haiti and faces a murder charge in Florida, officials said. President Trump has fought to end protections for Haitian immigrants.

dailyNews.title: Judge Declines to Order Trump Administration to Adjust Somali Deportation Policies
dailyNews.description: Acknowledging that the government may have recently stepped up the pace of removal proceedings, a federal judge wrote that he could not immediately intervene.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Changes Lock Some Employers Out of H-1B Visa Program
dailyNews.description: Since imposing a $100,000 fee on new visas in September, the Trump administration has upended the skilled worker program.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls Artemis II astronauts "modern-day pioneers" in live conversation
dailyNews.description: President Trump praised the crew of NASA's Artemis II mission in a brief chat late Monday, saying they had "inspired the entire world" after they looped around the moon in a record-breaking voyage.

dailyNews.title: Kamala Harris says she might run for president in 2028: "I'm thinking about it"
dailyNews.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris said that she might run for president in 2028, telling a gathering in New York that she is considering mounting a third bid for the White House.

dailyNews.title: Vance heads to Pakistan for Iran talks
dailyNews.description: Vice President JD Vance is headed to Islamabad, Pakistan, for talks with Iranian officials aimed at ending the war. This comes as President Trump continues to blast Tehran over access to the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Olivia Rinaldi and Imtiaz Tyab report.

dailyNews.title: DOJ argues D.C. pipe bomb defendant not covered by Trump's Jan. 6 pardons
dailyNews.description: The DOJ said in a court filing that the D.C. pipe bomb defendant's case should not be dismissed and that his actions were not covered by Trump's sweeping pardons of the Jan. 6 rioters.

dailyNews.title: A mother mourning the son she lost in the Iran war says she told Trump: 'Go get 'em'
dailyNews.description: More than a month after her son, Maj. Cody Khork, died in the Iran war, Donna Burhans has found a routine that helps her cope.

dailyNews.title: Exclusive: Cuban president reacts to Trump admin’s call for him to step down
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Cuban President Miguel Díaz-Canel says "stepping down [is] not part of our vocabulary" amid reports that the U.S. government has asked the Cuban leader to resign.

dailyNews.title: Hunter Biden open to cage match with Trump sons
dailyNews.description: Hunter Biden open to cage match with Trump sons
